categories.description: ESOL solubility via mat-gram (SMI-TED): direct SMILES or batch model prediction over an attached Graph table

endpoints.description: Predict aqueous solubility (ESOL log10 mol/L) via mat-gram /embeddings on this host
endpoints.label: Predict

endpoints.description: Batch model prediction on attached table SMILES column (output column e.g. pred/esol)
endpoints.label: Predict table

form.name: message
form.label: Batch request
form.default: Predict ESOL for each row into column pred

categories.description: ZINC lead-like + PubChem compound databases via the query agent on this host

endpoints.description: Natural-language SQL over zinc_leadlike and pubchem_compounds
endpoints.label: Query

form.name: message
form.label: Question
form.default: How many molecules have MW between 200 and 350?

endpoints.description: Describe matching ZINC/PubChem SQL twins and their required params (no DB execution)
endpoints.label: Capabilities

form.name: message
form.label: Question
form.default: What ZINC and PubChem query params are required?

categories.description: Plotly charts over an attached Graph table (requires table hold context)

endpoints.description: LangGraph Plotly analyst over attached table rows
endpoints.label: Chart

form.name: message
form.label: Chart request
form.default: Scatter of the first two numeric columns

categories.description: SciPy/pandas numeric column transforms (not SMILES model prediction)

endpoints.description: Numeric/math transforms only — not model prediction on SMILES
endpoints.label: Transform

form.label: Transform request
form.default: Add a z-score column of the first numeric column
